dialogueLines.dialogueText: CRAP! CRAP! NOT GOOD! NOT GOOD!
Those bosses outside… They’re threatening to take over the saloon!
I DIDN’T SET THE RECORD FOR LARGEST DEBTS TO LOSE THIS SALOON SO EASILY!
You must, Duke, verse this gang and become the Hero of this Haven!
WOOHOO, DROVER’S DOWN! My chronic fear of pigs was finally validated.
Next up is the miner Julius! Take him down!
Though, don’t be too hard; I don’t want us to get sued for elderly abuse.
On a roll, Duke! We might actually have a chance…
Though be careful, the next up are those two magicians.
If they were less murderous, their whole disappearing act would make them great birthday entertainers.
Also, try hitting a little away from the saloon; Hero’s Haven is proudly a smoke-free zone!
Almost here! Ash is the only enforcer left before we face the big boss herself!
Be careful with handling all those fires she sets. Fire and alcohol don’t mix well together.
If you get caught, remember: Stop, Drop, and Roll!
The final battle is here, Duke! The CEO Granny herself is the gang’s final line of defense.
Whatever happens, thank you so much for the fight you put up to save this saloon since you came!
Words alone can’t express my gratitude. Thank you Duke…
.. Ugh! Waterworks are for later! Finish this Duke!
WE DID! WE DID! WE DID! HERO’S HAVEN IS SAVED.
Oh man.. I think I’m going to take a long long nap! The stress probably cut half off my lifespan.
